SHOOT.title: Shoot
SHOOT.description: {IfUpgraded:show:Fire the current chamber's bullet. If empty, deal 9 damage instead.|Fire the current chamber's bullet. If empty, deal 5 damage instead.}
DEFEND_GUNSLINGER.title: Defend
PANNING.title: Panning
PANNING.description: {IfUpgraded:show:Fire all loaded bullets in order at the target. Each shot deals +6 damage. If empty, deal 8 damage instead.|Fire all loaded bullets in order at the target. Each shot deals +4 damage. If empty, deal 6 damage instead.}
SPRAY_FIRE.title: Spray Fire
SPRAY_FIRE.description: {IfUpgraded:show:Fire all loaded bullets at random enemies. If empty, deal 12 damage to all enemies instead.|Fire all loaded bullets at random enemies. If empty, deal 8 damage to all enemies instead.}
SEAL_LOAD.title: Seal Load
SEAL_LOAD.description: {IfUpgraded:show:Load 1 Seal round. If one is newly loaded, add a temporary Seal Shot to your hand. If one is already loaded, raise its Seal Level by 1 instead. Gain 8 Block.|Load 1 Seal round. If one is newly loaded, add a temporary Seal Shot to your hand. If one is already loaded, raise its Seal Level by 1 instead. Gain 5 Block.}
SEAL_SEARCH.title: Seal Search
SEAL_SEARCH.description: {IfUpgraded:show:Draw 3 cards. If a Seal bullet is loaded, move the highest-level Seal bullet into the firing chamber.|Draw 2 cards. If a Seal bullet is loaded, move the highest-level Seal bullet into the firing chamber.}
SEAL_RITE.title: Seal Priming
SEAL_RITE.description: {IfUpgraded:show:(1) Power: At turn start, load 1 Seal round. Whenever you fire a Seal round, the next Seal round gains +1 level. When played, if no Seal round is loaded, load 1 and add a temporary Seal Shot to your hand.|Power: At turn start, load 1 Seal round. Whenever you fire a Seal round, the next Seal round gains +1 level. When played, if no Seal round is loaded, load 1 and add a temporary Seal Shot to your hand.}
SEAL_AMPLIFY.title: Seal Amplify
SEAL_AMPLIFY.description: {IfUpgraded:show:Increase the loaded Seal bullet's level by 3.|Increase the loaded Seal bullet's level by 2. Exhaust.}
SEAL_IMPRINT.title: Seal Imprint
SEAL_IMPRINT.description: {IfUpgraded:show:Set the loaded Seal bullet's level to at least 7.|Set the loaded Seal bullet's level to at least 5.}
SEAL_RELEASE_KAI.title: Seal Release: Kai
SEAL_RELEASE_KAI.description: {IfUpgraded:show:Align the highest loaded Seal bullet to the firing chamber. Fire it 2 times. Retain.|Align the highest loaded Seal bullet to the firing chamber. Fire it 2 times.}
SEAL_RAMPAGE.title: Seal Rampage
SEAL_RAMPAGE.description: {IfUpgraded:show:Playable only if a Seal bullet is loaded. Remove all loaded Seal rounds. Gain [gold]Energy[/gold] equal to rounds removed. Draw 1 card.|Playable only if a Seal bullet is loaded. Remove all loaded Seal rounds. Gain [gold]Energy[/gold] equal to rounds removed.}
SEAL_INSIGHT.title: Seal Insight
SEAL_INSIGHT.description: Draw {Draw} cards. If a Seal bullet is loaded, draw +1. If Seal Level is 7+, draw +1 more.
IMPRINT.title: Imprint
IMPRINT_MANIFEST_RICOCHET.title: Manifest Ricochet
IMPRINT_MANIFEST_RICOCHET.description: {IfUpgraded:show:Spend 3 Imprint. This turn, all bullet fires trigger Ricochet.|Spend 4 Imprint. This turn, all bullet fires trigger Ricochet.}
SILVER_BULLET.title: Silver Bullet
UNLOAD.title: Unload
SABOTAGE.title: Sabotage
SABOTAGE.description: All enemies lose 5 Strength until end of turn.
STEADY_AIM.title: Steady Aim
EMPTY_THE_MAGAZINE.title: Empty the Magazine
EMPTY_THE_MAGAZINE.description: Remove all loaded bullets. Draw that many cards. Then, you cannot draw additional cards this turn.
TRACER_LOAD.title: Tracer Load
TRACER_LOAD.description: {IfUpgraded:show:Load 4 Tracer rounds. Draw 1 card.|Load 3 Tracer rounds. Draw 1 card.}
TRACER_CONVERSION.title: Tracer Conversion
TRACER_CONVERSION.description: {IfUpgraded:show:Convert up to 2 loaded Normal bullets into Tracer bullets. Draw 1 card.|Convert up to 2 loaded Normal bullets into Tracer bullets. }
READ_THE_MARK.title: Read the Mark
READ_THE_MARK.description: {IfUpgraded:show:Gain {Block:diff()} Block. If you have Ricochet, draw 1 card. Gain 1 Imprint.|Gain {Block:diff()} Block. If you have Ricochet, draw 1 card. Gain 1 Imprint.}
FAN_THE_BRAND.title: Fan the Brand
FAN_THE_BRAND.description: {IfUpgraded:show:Gain 2 Ricochet. Gain 1 Imprint.|Gain 1 Ricochet. Gain 1 Imprint.}
TAG_BURST.title: Tag Burst
TAG_BURST.description: {IfUpgraded:show:Trigger Pull 1 time. On successful shot, deal an additional {Damage:diff()} damage plus 2 per Imprint. Gain 3 Ricochet.|Trigger Pull 1 time. On successful shot, deal an additional {Damage:diff()} damage plus 1 per Imprint. Gain 2 Ricochet.}
WALKING_FIRE.title: Walking Fire
WALKING_FIRE.description: {IfUpgraded:show:Spend 3 Imprint. Trigger Pull 3 times. If any shot succeeds, load 1 Tracer round and add it to Overclock counter.|Spend 3 Imprint. Trigger Pull 2 times. If any shot succeeds, load 1 Tracer round and add it to Overclock counter.}
CROSSFIRE_RHYTHM.title: Crossfire Rhythm
CROSSFIRE_RHYTHM.description: {IfUpgraded:show:Spend 2 Imprint. Trigger Pull 2 times. If Tracer Rhythm is ON, trigger pull +1 additional time.|Spend 2 Imprint. Trigger Pull 1 time. If Tracer Rhythm is ON, trigger pull +1 additional time.}
TAKE_COVER.title: Take Cover
TAKE_COVER.description: {IfUpgraded:show:Gain {Block:diff()} Block. Gain +1 Block per empty chamber.|Gain {Block:diff()} Block. Gain +1 Block per empty chamber.}
RICOCHET_SHOT.title: Ricochet Shot
RICOCHET_SHOT.description: {IfUpgraded:show:Deal 12 damage. If you have Imprint, spend 1 and deal 10 damage to a random enemy twice.|Deal 9 damage. If you have Imprint, spend 1 and deal 7 damage to a random enemy twice.}
EXECUTION_SHOT.title: Execution Shot
EXECUTION_SHOT.description: {IfUpgraded:show:Trigger Pull 1 time. If target is at or below half HP, deal 3x damage.|Trigger Pull 1 time. If target is at or below half HP, deal 2x damage.}
QUICK_RACK.title: Quick Rack
QUICK_RACK.description: {IfUpgraded:show:Spend 1 Imprint. Load 2 Tracer rounds. If Hunt-start is active, Trigger Pull 2 times.|Spend 1 Imprint. Load 2 Tracer rounds. If Hunt-start is active, Trigger Pull 1 time.}
HOT_CHAMBER.title: Hot Chamber
HOT_CHAMBER.description: {IfUpgraded:show:Load 2 Tracer bullets. If Hunt-start is ON, draw 2 cards.|Spend 1 Imprint. Load 2 Tracer bullets. If Hunt-start is ON, draw 2 cards.}
CHAIN_BURST.title: Chain Burst
CHAIN_BURST.description: {IfUpgraded:show:Spend 2 Imprint. Trigger Pull 1 time. If the first successful shot is Tracer, trigger pull +3 additional times.|Spend 2 Imprint. Trigger Pull 1 time. If the first successful shot is Tracer, trigger pull +2 additional times.}
OVERCLOCK_DRUM.title: Overclock Drum
OVERCLOCK_DRUM.description: The first Tracer shot you fire each turn triggers 1 extra trigger pull. Tracks Tracer shots; every 5 shots deal 8 damage to all enemies. This effect does not stack.
SIGIL_GUARD.title: Sigil Guard
SIGIL_GUARD.description: {IfUpgraded:show:Gain 12 Block. Gain +1 Block per Seal Level.|Gain 8 Block. Gain +1 Block per Seal Level.}
GRAND_RITE.title: Grand Rite
GRAND_RITE.description: {IfUpgraded:show:Increase the highest loaded Seal Level by 3. Align it to the firing chamber. Directly fire it 1 time.|Increase the highest loaded Seal Level by 2. Align it to the firing chamber. Directly fire it 1 time.}
ECHO_NOTE.title: Echo Note
ECHO_NOTE.description: {IfUpgraded:show:Spend 1 Imprint. Draw 2 cards. If you have no Imprint, draw 1 card instead.|Spend 1 Imprint. Draw 2 cards.}
REBOUND_NET.title: Rebound Net
REBOUND_NET.description: {IfUpgraded:show:Gain 1 Ricochet per enemy. (Costs 0).|Gain 1 Ricochet per enemy. }
ETCHED_TRACER.title: Etched Tracer
ETCHED_TRACER.description: {IfUpgraded:show:Trigger Pull 1 time at target enemy. Then load 2 Tracer round(s).|Trigger Pull 1 time at target enemy. Then load 1 Tracer round(s).}
CHAMBER_SWAP_NEXT.title: Chamber Swap Next
CHAMBER_SWAP_NEXT.description: Swap the current firing chamber with the next chamber.
EVASION.title: Evasion
EVASION.description: {IfUpgraded:show:Gain 10 Block. This turn, reduce incoming damage by up to 14.|Gain 8 Block. This turn, reduce incoming damage by up to 10.}
RELOAD.title: Reload
RELOAD.description: {IfUpgraded:show:Load 3 Standard rounds. Draw 1 card.|Load 2 Standard rounds. Draw 1 card.}
IMPRINT_IGNITION.title: Imprint Ignition
IMPRINT_COMPRESSION.title: Imprint Compression
OVERCLOCK_CHARGE.title: Overclock Charge
BALLISTIC_COMPILER.title: Ballistic Compiler
IMPRINT_IGNITION.description: {IfUpgraded:show:Power: Your bullet shots deal +2 damage.|Power: Your bullet shots deal +1 damage.}
IMPRINT_COMPRESSION.description: {IfUpgraded:show:At the start of your turn, if you have at least 2 Imprint, draw 1 card.|At the start of your turn, if you have at least 3 Imprint, draw 1 card.}
IMPRINT_SQUEEZE.title: Imprint Squeeze
IMPRINT_SQUEEZE.description: {IfUpgraded:show:Discard 1 card. Gain 3 Imprint.|Discard 1 card. Gain 2 Imprint.}
OVERCLOCK_CHARGE.description: {IfUpgraded:show:On your 3rd successful shot each turn, gain 1 [gold]Energy[/gold]. Gain 1 Imprint. Innate.|On your 3rd successful shot each turn, gain 1 [gold]Energy[/gold]. Gain 1 Imprint.}
BALLISTIC_COMPILER.description: {IfUpgraded:show:On your first Tracer shot each turn, draw 1 card and gain 2 Imprint.|On your first Tracer shot each turn, draw 1 card and gain 1 Imprint.}
BLANK_FIRE.title: Blank Fire
BLANK_FIRE.description: {IfUpgraded:show:Enter Hunt-start. Trigger Pull 1 time. Draw 1 card.|Enter Hunt-start. Trigger Pull 1 time.}
SEAL_BARRIER.description: {IfUpgraded:show:(0) Gain 5 Block. If a Seal bullet is loaded, gain additional Block equal to twice the highest Seal Level.|Gain 5 Block. If a Seal bullet is loaded, gain additional Block equal to twice the highest Seal Level.}
SEAL_BARRIER.title: Seal Barrier
SEAL_OPEN.title: Seal Open
SEAL_OPEN.description: {IfUpgraded:show:Move the highest-level loaded Seal bullet into the firing chamber. Raise its Seal level by 2.|Move the highest-level loaded Seal bullet into the firing chamber. Raise its Seal level by 1.}
SEAL_RESONANCE.title: Seal Resonance
SEAL_RESONANCE.description: {IfUpgraded:show:Deal damage equal to your total loaded Seal levels x12. Then reset all loaded Seal levels to 1.|Deal damage equal to your total loaded Seal levels x9. Then reset all loaded Seal levels to 1.}
CASING_COUNT.title: Casing Count
CASING_COUNT.description: {IfUpgraded:show:Gain Imprint equal to empty chambers (max 3). Draw 1 card.|Gain Imprint equal to empty chambers (max 3). }
SEAL_TENSION.title: Seal Tension
SEAL_TENSION.description: {IfUpgraded:show:If a Seal bullet is loaded: Gain 10 Block. Increase that Seal Level by 3. Otherwise, load 1 Seal bullet and add a temporary Seal Shot to your hand.|If a Seal bullet is loaded: Gain 7 Block. Increase that Seal Level by 2. Otherwise, load 1 Seal bullet and add a temporary Seal Shot to your hand.}
FINAL_VOLLEY.title: Final Volley
FINAL_VOLLEY.description: {IfUpgraded:show:Trigger Pull 3 times. If the first 2 shots succeed, gain 1 [gold]Energy[/gold].|Trigger Pull 2 times. If the first 2 shots succeed, gain 1 [gold]Energy[/gold].}
GRAND_CHAMBER.title: Grand Chamber
GRAND_CHAMBER.description: {IfUpgraded:show:If a Seal bullet is loaded: draw 2 cards, align that Seal to the firing chamber, and increase its level by 1. (Costs 1).|If a Seal bullet is loaded: draw 2 cards, align that Seal to the firing chamber, and increase its level by 1.}
DEAD_ANGLE.title: Dead Angle
DEAD_ANGLE.description: {IfUpgraded:show:Spend 2 Imprint. Gain 3 Ricochet. Draw 1 card. (Costs 0).|Spend 2 Imprint. Gain 3 Ricochet. Draw 1 card. }
RICOCHET_PRIMER.title: Ricochet Primer
RICOCHET_PRIMER.description: {IfUpgraded:show:Gain 3 Ricochet. Gain 1 Imprint.|Gain 2 Ricochet. Gain 1 Imprint.}
BANK_SHOT.title: Bank Shot
BANK_SHOT.description: {IfUpgraded:show:Trigger Pull 1 time. If you have Ricochet, consume 1 Ricochet. Deal an additional {Damage:diff()} damage.|Trigger Pull 1 time. If you have Ricochet, consume 1 Ricochet. Deal an additional {Damage:diff()} damage.}
TRACER_STRIKE.title: Tracer Strike
TRACER_STRIKE.description: {IfUpgraded:show:Load 2 Tracer bullets. Trigger Pull 1 time.|Load 1 Tracer bullet. Trigger Pull 1 time.}
HUNT_TRIGGER.title: Hunt Trigger
HUNT_TRIGGER.description: {IfUpgraded:show:Trigger Pull 1 time. If Hunt-start is ON, trigger pull +2 additional times. Otherwise, load 1 Tracer bullet.|Trigger Pull 1 time. If Hunt-start is ON, trigger pull +1 additional time. Otherwise, load 1 Tracer bullet.}
SEAL_BREAK.title: Seal Break
SEAL_BREAK.description: {IfUpgraded:show:Align the highest loaded Seal bullet to the firing chamber. Directly fire 1 loaded Seal bullet. On successful fire, draw 2 cards.|Align the highest loaded Seal bullet to the firing chamber. Directly fire 1 loaded Seal bullet. On successful fire, draw 1 card.}
RICOCHET_FOLLOW_UP.title: Ricochet Follow-Up
RICOCHET_FOLLOW_UP.description: {IfUpgraded:show:Trigger Pull 1 time. If you have Ricochet, Trigger Pull +1 time.|Trigger Pull 1 time. If you have Ricochet, draw 1 card. Gain 1 Imprint.}
HUNT_PREP.title: Hunt Prep
HUNT_PREP.description: {IfUpgraded:show:Enter Hunt-start. Load 2 Tracer rounds. Draw 2 cards.|Enter Hunt-start. Load 2 Tracer rounds. Draw 1 card.}
BARRAGE_COLLAPSE.title: Barrage Collapse
BARRAGE_COLLAPSE.description: {IfUpgraded:show:Gain 5 Ricochet. This turn, for the first 5 Ricochet triggers, deal 3 damage to all other enemies.|Gain 4 Ricochet. This turn, for the first 4 Ricochet triggers, deal 3 damage to all other enemies.}
SEAL_PRESSURE.title: Seal Pressure
SEAL_PRESSURE.description: {IfUpgraded:show:Attempt to load Seal rounds 2 times (if already loaded, increase Seal Level by 1 instead). If at least one new Seal round is loaded, add a temporary Seal Shot to your hand. If Seal Level is 2+, gain Block equal to highest Seal Level.|Attempt to load Seal rounds 1 time (if already loaded, increase Seal Level by 1 instead). If a new Seal round is loaded, add a temporary Seal Shot to your hand. If Seal Level is 2+, gain Block equal to highest Seal Level.}
BRANDED_SHOT.title: Branded Shot
BRANDED_SHOT.description: {IfUpgraded:show:Trigger Pull 1 time. On successful shot, gain 1 Ricochet and 2 Imprint.|Trigger Pull 1 time. On successful shot, gain 1 Ricochet and 1 Imprint.}
TRACER_STORM.title: Tracer Storm
TRACER_STORM.description: {IfUpgraded:show:Load 5 Tracer rounds. If Overclock Drum is active, increase its counter by loaded amount.|Load 3 Tracer rounds. If Overclock Drum is active, increase its counter by loaded amount.}
SEALED_RICOCHET.title: Sealed Ricochet
SEALED_RICOCHET.description: {IfUpgraded:show:Align highest Seal round to current chamber and fire 1 time. Gain Imprint equal to fired Seal Level (no level requirement).|Align highest Seal round to current chamber and fire 1 time. If fired Seal Level is 2+, gain Imprint equal to that level.}
IMPRINT_SEAL.title: Imprint Seal
IMPRINT_SEAL.description: {IfUpgraded:show:Spend 1 Imprint. Increase all loaded Seal rounds by 1 level.|Spend 2 Imprint. Increase all loaded Seal rounds by 2 levels.}
TRACER_BRAND.title: Tracer Brand
TRACER_BRAND.description: {IfUpgraded:show:Load 1 Tracer round. Gain 2 Imprint per living enemy.|Load 1 Tracer round. Gain 1 Imprint per living enemy.}
RICOCHET_BURST.title: Ricochet Burst
RICOCHET_BURST.description: {IfUpgraded:show:Trigger Pull 1 time. If the fired round is Tracer, gain 2 Ricochet.|Trigger Pull 1 time. If the fired round is Tracer, gain 1 Ricochet.}
SEAL_BURST_LOAD.title: Seal Burst Load
SEAL_BURST_LOAD.description: {IfUpgraded:show:Attempt to load Seal rounds 2 times (if already loaded, increase Seal Level by 1 instead). If at least one new Seal round is loaded, add a temporary Seal Shot to your hand. Then load 2 Tracer rounds.|Attempt to load Seal rounds 1 time (if already loaded, increase Seal Level by 1 instead). If a new Seal round is loaded, add a temporary Seal Shot to your hand. Then load 1 Tracer round.}
ETCHED_RESONANCE.title: Etched Resonance
ETCHED_RESONANCE.description: {IfUpgraded:show:Load Tracer rounds equal to highest Seal Level. Reduce all loaded Seal levels to 1.|Load Tracer rounds equal to highest Seal Level. Reduce all loaded Seal levels to 0.}
SEAL_SHOT.title: Seal Shot
SEAL_SHOT.description: Align the highest-level loaded Seal round to the firing chamber. Directly fire 1 loaded Seal round. Exhaust.
